subcodes.first_line: O ye friends! Hark! The Call of the Covenant resoundeth, and the melody of unity ringeth out. Unto the people of illumination, the horizon of being is bright and clear [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران بانک بانک میثاق است و نغمه نغمه وفاق بر اهل اشراق افق وجود روشن است
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @role of the Covenant in preserving unity
